since_last: 69% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.39%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.60% · BTC -2.48% · Gold +0.78% · Nasdaq100 +1.53%. 69% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.39%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.39%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +12.47%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +12.47%, AMBA +10.90%, ANET +9.67%, AMD +9.52%, VRT +8.52%. Laggards: AVAV -6.50%, INTU -3.58%, UPST -3.15%, WDAY -2.47%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.14% at $162.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
